spans.name: subagent:GitHub Copilot Chat
spans.input: [{"role":"user","parts":[{"type":"text","content":"it should cover everything, all are logged, you can go through each trace and validate"}]}]
spans.output:
[{"role":"assistant","parts":[{"type":"text","content":"Sounds gucci. I went trace-by-trace through the real March execution windows and validated against the raw Tempo payloads, not just search results. The raw data does not currently show full coverage.

For actual subagent-run traces, I can confirm these three trace trees:
- `e48554e55df65b22507ce3d236093c77` with `32` `execute_tool runSubagent` spans, `16` `invoke_agent bug-analyzer` spans, and `16` `invoke_agent fix-validator` spans.
- `bb53d47e8409495968c4f0afc02fdc59` with a single `invoke_agent bug-analyzer` span.
- `29988777dc6aa4ab504f394b6dfd03c3` with `23` `execute_tool runSubagent` spans, `12` `invoke_agent bug-analyzer` spans, and `12` `invoke_agent fix-validator` spans.

There are also parent chat traces that mention March analysis folders but are not direct per-analysis subagent trees, mainly `c5989fa1a5a41d7f2f7e229e45d4f99e` and `7fefb70bee48cd36ac94407a12cf54a0`. Using raw pre-debug Tempo payloads, that gives:
- `28` March folders with direct subagent spans
- `23` more March folders visible only in parent/root chat traces
- `9` March folders with no Tempo trace payload at all in their actual execution window

The missing nine are:
- `304382`
- `304488`
- `304493`
- `304525`
- `304544`
- `304613`
- `304614`
- `304746`
- `304774`

Why I’m confident those nine are missing from Tempo: their output files were written between `2026-04-10 21:59 -0700` and `2026-04-10 22:45 -0700`, but Tempo returns zero traces for that exact UTC block (`2026-04-11 04:50Z` to `06:10Z`) in all four cases:
- unfiltered search
- session-scoped search
- `runSubagent` search
- `bug-analyzer` / `fix-validator` search

So the gap is in telemetry coverage, not just in the website mapping. Also, text-based Tempo search is noisy here: some hits came from helper model traces that summarized validation content later, which is why I relied on raw `/api/traces/<id>` payloads as the ground truth.

If you want, I can do one of these next:
1. Generate

I’m targeting the remaining nine IDs directly now and checking when their matching traces started, so we can separate real March-run traces from later prompt echoes."},{"type":"tool_call","id":"call_hsd8ulPhPVropQPaHl07NIa3","name":"mcp_pylance_mcp_s_pylanceRunCodeSnippet","arguments":"{\"workspaceRoot\":\"file:///Users/penlv/Code/Work/sounds-gucci\",\"workingDirectory\":\"/Users/penlv/Code/Work/sounds-gucci\",\"timeout\":120000,\"codeSnippet\":\"import json, urllib.request, urllib.parse, datetime\\nBASE='http://localhost:3000/api/datasources/proxy/uid/tempo/api/search'\\nmissing=['304382','304488','304493','304525','304544','304613','304614','304746','304774']\\nfor analysis_id in missing:\\n    q='{span.gen_ai.input.messages =~ \\\".*data/analysis/%s.*\\\"} || {span.gen_ai.tool.call.arguments =~ \\\".*data/analysis/%s.*\\\"} || {span.gen_ai.output.messages =~ \\\".*data/analysis/%s.*\\\"} || {span.gen_ai.tool.call.result =~ \\\".*data/analysis/%s.*\\\"}' % (analysis_id, analysis_id, analysis_id, analysis_id)\\n    url=BASE+'?'+urllib.parse.urlencode({'query': q, 'limit': '20', 'start': '1775869600', 'end': '1776013200'})\\n    with urllib.request.urlopen(url) as r:\\n        data=json.load(r)\\n    traces=data.get('traces', [])\\n    print('ID', analysis_id, 'count', len(traces))\\n    for t in traces[:8]:\\n        ts=int(t['startTimeUnixNano'])/1e9\\n        print(' ', datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(ts, datetime.UTC).isoformat(), t['traceID'], t.get('rootTraceName'))\\n    print('---')\"}"}]}]

spans.input: {"command":"setopt errexit && cd /Users/penlv/Code/Work/sounds-gucci && for id in 304382 304488 304493 304525 304544 304613 304614 304746 304774; do stat -f '%Sm %N' -t '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z' \"data/analysis/$id/gpt-5.4-2026-04-11/proposed-fix.md\"; stat -f '%Sm %N' -t '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z' \"data/analysis/$id/gpt-5.4-2026-04-11/validation.md\"; done","explanation":"Read the filesystem timestamps of the nine uncovered March outputs so I can align the missing traces against their actual execution times.","goal":"Identify execution times for missing March analyses","mode":"sync","timeout":30000}
